title: KCD New York 2026
description: To follow all our latest news and announcements, please...Join us with LF account.Follow us on Twitter.Follow us on Linkedin.

title: Craft ton CFP en live avec l'équipe du KCD Provence 2026
description: KCD Provence est une conférence communautaire qui rassemble développeurs, plateform engineers et professionnels IT passionnés par les technologies Cloud Native. Organisé par l'association Cloud Native Provence, cet événement s'inscrit dans le réseau mondial des Kubernetes Community Days soutenu par la CNCF.Pendant une journée, vous profiterez de talks inspirants donnés par des experts, d'ateliers…

title: KCD Kuala Lumpur 2026
description: 🚀 Get ready for KCD Kuala Lumpur 2026 🚀This is the premier event for Malaysia’s cloud native and Kubernetes community! We’re bringing a full day of innovation, learning and collaboration to Kuala Lumpur.

title: Kubernetes Community Days Lima 2026
description: Kubernetes Community Days Lima, Perú 🇵🇪🎉 Bienvenidos a la Comunidad Cloud Native de Perú Kubernetes Community Days Lima, Perú es una iniciativa liderada por entusiastas y profesionales de la tecnología 🚀 con el objetivo de fortalecer, educar y ampliar la comunidad Cloud Native en Perú y Latinoamérica.

title: KCD San Francisco Bay Area 2026
description: KCD SF Bay Area is the premiere annual community event for cloud native enthusiasts in the San Francisco Bay Area, sponsored by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF)--Our Fiscal Sponsor is NāOM Lab LLC - All payments and contracts will be held in this company name for the benefit of KCD SF Bay Area members.

title: KCD x Ceph x OpenInfra Day Korea 2026
description: 쿠버네티스 코리아 그룹입니다. 쿠버네티스, 클라우드, 오픈소스에 대한 열정이 있는 모든 분들을 환영합니다!

title: KCD Washington DC 2026
description: KCD Washington DC is the premiere annual gathering of the local cloud native community in the DMV region. We bring together practitioners, software publishers, end-users and other community members for a full day immersive experience in cloud native technologies and open source projects. Supported by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation, we serve local members as a non-profit community service.

title: KCD São Paulo 2026
description: KCD São Paulo 2026 🚀☁️O maior encontro da galera Cloud Native em São Paulo 🌎Os KCDs (Kubernetes Community Days) são festas da comunidade que juntam a galera louca por tecnologia, Open Source e Cloud Native 🌎 Evento 100% Presencial 🔥A gente vai juntar profissionais de TI, estudantes, líderes, empresas e fãs para promover um monte de coisas legais, tipo:📚 Aprendizado massa e troca de ideias🤝…

title: Kubernetes Community Days Sofia 2026
description: Since its inception in 2018, the Bulgarian Cloud Native Community has evolved into a thriving ecosystem. What began as a small meetup with just 30 participants has grown to a dedicated group of over 2,000 members, with consistent attendance of more than 100 cloud-native enthusiasts at each event.

title: KCD Nigeria 2026: Telling the African Cloud Native Story
description: The Cloud Native ecosystem is gaining popularity in the continent of Africa and there has been a surge in talents focusing on DevSecOps, Containers, Cloud Computing, and Kubernetes. There is however little to no community to support these talents, leading to many aiming to attend conferences like KubeCon, a huge number of whom are always seeking limited scholarship opportunities to these events.

title: KCD Porto 2026 | Collab with DevOps Days Portugal
description: The Kubernetes and Cloud Native community will gather again in Porto for KCD Porto 2025—the only Kubernetes Community Days event in Iberia in 2025. Built by the community, for the community, it brings together developers, platform engineers, and cloud specialists for two days of inspiring talks and networking.

title: KCD Panama 2026
description: Kubernetes Community Days (KCD) Panama is a premier, community-driven event at the Hub of the Americas dedicated to exploring cloud-native technologies, with a focus on Kubernetes and the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) ecosystem.What to ExpectKCD Panama serves as the central hub for the region's cloud-native practitioners, architects, and IT leaders to converge, share knowledge, and…
